name: 中考作文 · 5 大文体高分句型（22→28 拔高）
desc: 五种文体各 4 句招牌句式，出现一句加一档：书信(I'm writing to / It would mean a lot to me if)、记叙(It was not until…that / No sooner had I…than / 分词伴随)、议论(There is no doubt that / While 让步 / Not only 倒装)、说明(定从 which / known as / Take…as an example)、万金油(As the saying goes / The more…the more / What…is)。配对记句式 + 句境选句式，答案唯一带解析。改编自王老师《5 大文体高分句型》，与 MISS1 是「堵漏 + 拔高」一对。进阶免费档。

m1: 书信开篇万能模板（比 I want to 高三档）
It would mean a lot to me if…
委婉请求（比 Please 礼貌十倍）
I'd appreciate it if you could + do
书信收尾必杀（别忘 Yours / Sincerely）
强调结构：直到那时我才…（叙事高潮）
现在分词作伴随：一句同时给画面和动作
No sooner had I + done + than …
倒装 + 过去完成：我刚…就…
m2: 直接引语：给故事加声音，瞬间生动
亮观点首选（比 I think 高一档）
让步式开头：同句既看对立面又表态
递进 + 倒装：Not only 提句首 → 助动词倒装
In a word / All in all, …
议论收尾金句（比 So I think 高三档）
定语从句加分：给名词补一句解释
First of all / What's more / Last but not least
三段式分点（别用 firstly / secondly）
m3: 过去分词作后置定语（比 which is called 简洁）
Take … as an example / for instance
举例：抽象概念立刻具体化
引谚语：开头或论点支撑
What + 主语 + 动词 + is / was …
主语从句强调：最让我…的是…
越…越…：句式工整，逻辑感强
对比结构（比 and 高三档）

m4.q: Not only ___ reading expand our minds, but it also makes us calmer.
m4.why: Not only 置于句首，其后主句部分倒装用助动词；reading 三单 → does。

m4.q: No sooner ___ I sat down ___ the rain suddenly stopped.
m4.why: No sooner had + done + than…（倒装 + 过去完成，「我刚…就…」）。

m4.q: It was not until that moment ___ I understood what he really meant.
m4.why: It was not until … that … 强调结构，空处只能填 that。

m4.q: ___ the warm bowl in my hands, I suddenly felt at home.
m4.why: 现在分词作伴随状语，逻辑主语 I 主动「拿着」→ Holding。

m4.q: ___ I read, ___ I realize how little I know.
m4.why: The more…, the more… 「越…越…」固定句式。

m4.q: ___ that exercise plays a key role in our daily life.
m4.why: There is no doubt that + 从句（毫无疑问…），亮观点首选。

m4.q: ___ phones make life easier, they also waste a lot of our time.
m4.why: While 引导让步「虽然」，同句既看对立面又表态；其余逻辑不通。

m4.q: 选出书信开篇的「招牌高分句式」：
ops: I want to thank you for your help.
I'm writing to thank you for your help.
I write this letter to thank you.
m4.why: 书信开篇招牌 = I'm writing to + do（比 I want to / Thank you 高一档）；D 生硬。

m5.q: There is a special tea, ___ 「morning sun」 by the locals.
m5.why: 过去分词 known as 作后置定语（被当地人称为…）。

m5.q: It is a traditional festival ___ brings families together every year.
m5.why: 定语从句修饰物 festival，关系词用 which / that；what 不引导定语从句。

m5.q: ___, 「Where there is a will, there is a way.」
m5.why: As the saying goes 是「常言道」引谚语的固定说法。

m5.q: ___ my grandma ___ — she still wakes up at 5 every day.
m5.why: Take … as an example / for instance 举例固定搭配。

m5.q: ___ surprised me most ___ the smile on her face.
m5.why: What 引导主语从句作主语，谓语用单数 was。

m5.q: Some students love math, ___ others find it hard.
m5.why: Some … while others … 对比结构，while 表「而」。

m5.q: 选出用了「招牌收尾金句」的一项：
ops: So I think time is important.
All in all, what really matters is how we use our time.
In the end time is important.
I think time is very important so.
m5.why: All in all + What…is 是议论收尾金句（比 So I think 高三档）；其余平淡或语病。

m5.q: 同样表达「你今年进步很大」，最地道的招牌句是：
ops: There is no doubt that you have grown a lot this year.
No doubt you grow a lot this year.
It is no doubt you have grown a lot.
I no doubt you grew much this year.
m5.why: There is no doubt that + 从句 是固定招牌；B 缺 that/时态错、C 句型错、D 无此用法。
